descriptionText: Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019| Guest Cabins: 4| Crew Cabins:2| Tax not paidThe Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019 offers a practical balance of performance, comfort and space, making her a suitable choice for private cruising or charter use. Built in 2019 and currently lying in Athens, she has been kept in good condition, with regular maintenance and systems that remain fully operational. With 4 + 2 cabins and 4 heads, she provides generous accommodation while maintaining the performance reputation of the Nautitech line.Specifications:• Year: 2019 • Location: Athens • Cabins: 4 + 2 • Heads: 4 • Length Overall: 13.79 m • Beam: 7.54 m • Draft: 1.45 m • Engines: 2 × Yanmar 4JH4E (1,800 hours) • Fuel Capacity: 600 L • Water Capacity: 600 L • Generator: ONAN 11 kW (11MDKDN-8214A) • Air Conditioning: Yes • Watermaker: Yes • Inverter: Yes • Full‑batten mainsail and roller genoa • Electric toilets • Anchor windlass 1200 W • Lewmar Evo electric winch on flybridge • Tender 320 with 4 hp Yamaha outboard • Teak cockpit and aft deck • 2 × B&G Zeus 9" chartplotters • B&G instruments • Fusion sound system • 3 CCTV cameras + 1 docking camera • Refrigeration: 3 drawer fridges, 1 drawer freezer, 1 deep cockpit freezer • Steering wheels: 1 • Dinghy: Yes • Outboard: YesOverall, this Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019 presents a well‑maintained example of the model, offering a comfortable platform for both family sailing and charter operation. Her combination of onboard systems, accommodation layout and flybridge design makes her a versatile multihull ready for further use in the Mediterranean or beyond.
descriptionHtml:
Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019| Guest Cabins: 4| Crew Cabins:2| Tax not paid

The Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019 offers a practical balance of performance, comfort and space, making her a suitable choice for private cruising or charter use. Built in 2019 and currently lying in Athens, she has been kept in good condition, with regular maintenance and systems that remain fully operational. With 4 + 2 cabins and 4 heads, she provides generous accommodation while maintaining the performance reputation of the Nautitech line.

Specifications:

• Year: 2019
• Location: Athens
• Cabins: 4 + 2
• Heads: 4
• Length Overall: 13.79 m
• Beam: 7.54 m
• Draft: 1.45 m
• Engines: 2 × Yanmar 4JH4E (1,800 hours)
• Fuel Capacity: 600 L
• Water Capacity: 600 L
• Generator: ONAN 11 kW (11MDKDN-8214A)
• Air Conditioning: Yes
• Watermaker: Yes
• Inverter: Yes
• Full‑batten mainsail and roller genoa
• Electric toilets
• Anchor windlass 1200 W
• Lewmar Evo electric winch on flybridge
• Tender 320 with 4 hp Yamaha outboard
• Teak cockpit and aft deck
• 2 × B&G Zeus 9" chartplotters
• B&G instruments
• Fusion sound system
• 3 CCTV cameras + 1 docking camera
• Refrigeration: 3 drawer fridges, 1 drawer freezer, 1 deep cockpit freezer
• Steering wheels: 1
• Dinghy: Yes
• Outboard: Yes

Overall, this Nautitech 46 Fly For Sale 2019 presents a well‑maintained example of the model, offering a comfortable platform for both family sailing and charter operation. Her combination of onboard systems, accommodation layout and flybridge design makes her a versatile multihull ready for further use in the Mediterranean or beyond.
